title: Old Guns
description: Enjoy of some old guns with cool animations, is not the best gun mod but at least works
body:
![Colt1911Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/3S2xvEW.png)
![GalilShowcase](https://i.imgur.com/zOSI2k0.png)
![Olympia72Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/ZSt7aB9.png)
This mod is free to modpacks, just place a reference to this mod or give me the appropriate credits

if you have any suggestion, please comment

This mod contains:

Aks74u

Bizon

Colt 1911

Galil

Ithaca Model 37

Kar98k

Mp40

Mp5

Olympia72

Revolver

Skorpion

Sten

Thompson

Winchester Model 1894

Akm

Makarov

Mac10

AsVal

Sks

LugerP08

MauserC96

Mod Contents
![ModContents](https://i.imgur.com/SGSfDc5.png)
If you want to craft "iron with coal" wich is needed for crafting guns and the gun crafting station
![IronWithCoalRecipe](https://i.imgur.com/ko4kPPz.png)
Gun Crafting Station Recipe
![GunCraftingStationRecipe](https://i.imgur.com/kIwwIgW.png)
If you want to get steel, then you need to put the iron with coal in the furnace and it will give you steel :)

I recommend ussing JEI mod for the recipes

Also you can craft gunpowder

Important information

To equip bullets on the mag, you need to right click while holding it, then you can add or take bullets from it

To unload a mag, press the U key

Press Left Alt to watch a simple look animation

Press V for a melee hit

[![A place where you can find a cool review about this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7e033a508681269d897a67740fad8e6429b9b5_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/old-guns)

Future plans

Guns

.- At someone's request Ammo clips: ut_64bit idea

.- Mosin Nagant

.- STG 44

.- DP-28

.- MG42

.- M1 Garand

.- FnFal

Enter our Discord server so you can vote for the next guns

https://discord.gg/BPKmvKqCsZ

Enjoy
